data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. FABIO ZED scored a 1.3 lengths win this course and distance last time in a personal Best Time (17.53) and also clocked one of the quickest wins on the card. Has the ability and expected to go close again. 4. THAT'S OKAY is a capable type and proved too classy last time to win by 2.25 lengths at this track in a handy 17.52 beating Kawasaki Girl. Form from her last run is proving to be solid. Bold showing expected again. 8. TOUT BELLE scored (17.66) last time out at this track adding to an already respectable career. Makes plenty of appeal if runs up to latest. 2. BLUE TIARA must be respected despite an unplaced effort here most recently.","runners":[1,4,8,2],"exclusive":false}
